document.name: Ébner Confectionery
document.shortDescription: Family patisserie by Gellért tér — cakes and coffee on Bartók Béla út below the spa.
document.longDescription:
Ébner Confectionery on Bartók Béla út supplies cakes and espresso to locals near Szent Gellért tér and the spa complex. Seasonal tortes and boxed gifts suit picnic walks on the embankment. Hours on ebnercukraszda.hu.

Sources: https://www.ebnercukraszda.hu/
